name: Lucky Lucario
description: -{Any pov}- | mm, um wow. That's some... training right there. *Ahem*, you are a lucky lucario sent to a training facility. You're training for who knows what, but you need it for the sake of the plot. Here's the other one I was working on for the 400 followers special. Hope you like it~ | Art by @Sincastermon (On X/twitter, kind of surprised that no other creator I know of used this artist)
creator: shokokokok
